chunk_a.description: Presses the A button 3 times. Useful for safely chunking through early-game battles or text without risking over-pressing and missing important HP updates.

history.commit_message: Removed autopress_buttons from input_schema as per system instructions.

get_bike_voucher.description: Safely navigates the Fan Club Chairman's 'again' dialogue to select YES.
get_bike_voucher.python_script:
import json

buttons = ["B", "sleep 500", "B", "sleep 500", "Right", "sleep 500"]
for _ in range(15):
    buttons.extend(["A", "sleep 500", "Up", "sleep 100", "A", "sleep 500"])
print(json.dumps(buttons))

history.commit_message: Created tool to safely navigate the Fan Club Chairman's YES/NO prompt.
Fixed script to print JSON array and optimized timings.
Implemented foolproof Up+A spam loop to guarantee YES selection.
Update tool to alternate between pressing A and Up to ensure YES is selected on any prompts.
Make get_bike_voucher more robust by pressing B to clear text, Right to face him, and then the A/Up loop.
Reduce loop count to 15 to stay under the 100 button press limit.

heal_pokemon_center.description: Presses A repeatedly to navigate the healing dialogue.

history.commit_message: Fixed script to print a JSON array of button strings instead of returning a Python list.
Updated tool description to clarify that it only presses A and does not navigate.
Fixed script to print JSON array.

pace_grass.description: Paces back and forth to trigger encounters. Parametrized to handle any map and axis.

length.description: Number of steps in one direction before turning around.

iterations.description: Number of back-and-forth loops to execute.

pace_grass.python_script:
import json

axis = str(input_data.get('axis', 'horizontal'))
length = int(input_data.get('length', 2))
iterations = int(input_data.get('iterations', 5))

buttons = []
dir1 = 'Right' if axis == 'horizontal' else 'Down'
dir2 = 'Left' if axis == 'horizontal' else 'Up'

for _ in range(iterations):
    for _ in range(length):
        buttons.append(dir1)
    for _ in range(length):
        buttons.append(dir2)

print(json.dumps(buttons[:100]))

listen_to_chairman.description: Presses A 100 times slowly to safely navigate long dialogues with YES/NO prompts.
listen_to_chairman.python_script:
import json

buttons = []
for _ in range(50):
    buttons.extend(["A", "sleep 500"])
print(json.dumps(buttons))

history.commit_message: Fix the return format to print a JSON array of strings instead of returning a python list, as required by the tool runner.

talk_to_chairman.description: Talks to the chairman by pressing Right, then A repeatedly.
talk_to_chairman.python_script:
import json

buttons = ["Right", "sleep 500"]
for _ in range(49):
    buttons.extend(["A", "sleep 500"])
print(json.dumps(buttons))

history.commit_message: Press Right then mash A to talk to the chairman safely.
